title: Facilitator Guide — Day 10 — Market Validation Pitch & Stage Gate II
prepChecklist: Confirm squads completed FEC Validation Lab (6 steps)
Load Stage Gate ceremony in SPIKE (projector mode)
Review Squad XP leaderboard and mentor review panel

sessionFlow.activity: Opening — What The Market Taught Us
Market Validation Pitch — 5 min per squad + Q&A

sessionFlow.notes: Coach decision per squad: Not Ready / Almost Ready / Ready For Build.
Four dimensions: Learning, Collaboration, Professionalism, Readiness.

debriefQuestions: Which squad showed the strongest interview evidence?
What patterns emerged across Cassiopeia, Pegasus, and Argo Navis?
Who is ready for Week 3 BUILD stage?
commonPitfalls: Pitching ideas instead of customer quotes and validated problems
Missing FEC readiness on readiness cards
Individual grading instead of squad-first assessment
coachingTips: Use SPIKE presentation mode — slides already populated
Stage gate is squad decision only — no individual scores
Document remediation for Almost Ready squads before Week 3
